info.title: HR Policy Knowledge Lab API
info.description: REST API for the HR Policy Foundry Agent orchestrator. By default it runs Pattern A (single-agent MCP, ORCHESTRATOR_PATTERN=A): a single Foundry Agent with an MCPTool calls knowledge_base_retrieve against Azure AI Search and returns a grounded, citation-backed answer. Set ORCHESTRATOR_PATTERN=B for Pattern B (hybrid MCP + metadata lookup). The 4-step sequential pipeline is optional and enabled only via PIPELINE_MODE=multi_step.

functionKey.name: code
functionKey.description: Azure Functions host/function key passed as the 'code' query string parameter. Retrieve with: az functionapp keys list -g rg-hr-policy-kb-lab-dev -n func-hr-policy-kb-lab-dev. In Copilot Studio, choose API key auth, parameter name 'code', location Query.

post.description: Use this tool when the user asks WHAT an HR policy says, HOW it works, eligibility, amounts, deadlines, or process (PTO, leave, holiday pay, hiring, probation, dress code, IT/AI acceptable use, safety, code of ethics), or WHERE a policy document is stored (filename/blob path). It runs the Foundry Agent (Pattern A single-agent MCP by default; Pattern B adds a deterministic file-location lookup) and returns a grounded, citation-backed answer. Do NOT use this tool for greetings, acronym/policy-number glossary lookups (answer those from uploaded knowledge), or non-HR questions.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The HR policy question to ask.

answer.description: Grounded, citation-backed natural-language answer. Inline MCP citation annotations use the format 【message_idx:search_idx†source_name】. Present this answer to the user verbatim, including citation markers and any file paths.

is_grounded.description: Whether the answer is grounded in the knowledge base.

matches.description: Retrieval matches. Present only in multi-step mode (PIPELINE_MODE=multi_step).

references.description: Grounded citation references. Present only in multi-step mode (PIPELINE_MODE=multi_step).
